productDisplayName: Nike Men Chukka Go Suede Green Shoes
description: Casual chukka shoes from nike in pure suede, crafted with a downtown cool appeal. Wear this with black corduroys and semi-casual shoes. UpperSuede upper with a mid-top stylingPerforations from the midfoot to the back footStitch detail along the seams of the toe boxReinforced overlay at the heel collarCentral lace-upsPadded fabric liningMidsoleThick rubber midsole with foxing at the toe boxOutsoleRubber outsole with exaggerated herringbone patterned grooves and branding at the midfoot area of the outsoleshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
